changes: Void Reaping: The trait Melee Mastery III will now increase potency from 540 to 560; Enhanced Void Reaping will now increase potency from 600 to 620.
Cross Reaping: The trait Melee Mastery III will now increase potency from 540 to 560; Enhanced Cross Reaping will now increase potency from 600 to 620.
Grim Reaping: Potency has been increased from 200 to 220.
Sacrificium: Potency has been increased from 600 to 700.
Dragon Kick: Potency increased from 5,500 to 6,000.
Twin Snakes: Potency increased from 6,000 to 6,500.
Demolish: Potency increased from 6,500 to 7,000.
Leaping Opo: Potency increased from 7,000 to 8,000.
Rising Raptor: Potency increased from 7,500 to 8,500.
Pouncing Coeurl: Potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Thunderclap: Recast time reduced from 10 to 8 seconds.
Rising Phoenix: Charge time reduced from 16 to 12 seconds; additional effect 'Grants Fire's Rumination' removed.
Flint's Reply: Action removed.
Fire's Reply: Execution no longer requires status effect 'Fire's Rumination'; now has a charge timer of 16 seconds; now a charged action with a maximum of 2 charges.
Chaotic Spring: Potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Bunshin: Potency is no longer halved when executing Forked Raiju or Fleeting Raiju; additional damage granted will now ignore the effects of Guard when using Assassinate.
Huton: Increased movement speed effect changed from 25% to 50%.
Dokumori: Effect duration reduced from 8 to 6 seconds.
Meikyo Shisui: Effect duration increased from 2 to 3 seconds; additional effect 'Increases HP recovered via healing actions by 20%' added.
Tendo Setsugekka: Additional effect 'Restores own HP' added with a cure potency of 10,000.
Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka: Additional effect 'Restores own HP' added with a cure potency of 10,000.
Damage Dealt (Frontline only): Increased from -10% to -5%.
Void Reaping: Potency increased from 10,000 to 12,000; additional effect 'Absorbs 50% of damage dealt as HP' added.
Cross Reaping: Potency increased from 10,000 to 12,000; additional effect 'Absorbs 50% of damage dealt as HP' added.
Bloodcoil: Recast time reduced from 12 to 10 seconds.
Drill: Potency increased from 9,000 to 10,000.
Fan Dance: Effect duration increased from 5 to 6 seconds.
Curing Waltz: Cure potency increased from 8,000 to 12,000.
Limit Gauge Fill Rate (Frontline only): Increased from +15 seconds to +30 seconds.
Maximum HP: Reduced from 54,000 to 52,500.
Fire: Potency increased from 6,000 to 6,750.
Fire III: Potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Fire IV: Potency increased from 10,000 to 11,250.
High Fire II: Potency increased from 12,000 to 13,500; potency for enemies after the first increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Flare: Potency increased from 12,000 to 13,500.
Flare Star: Potency for damage over time inflicted by Burns increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Frost Star: Potency increased from 15,000 to 20,000.
Miracle of Nature: Additional effect 'Reduces MP by 1,000' removed; additional effect 'Increases target's damage taken by 20%' added.
Maximum HP: Reduced from 54,000 to 52,500.
Gravity II: Recast time reduced from 20 to 16 seconds; potency increased from 7,500 to 8,000; potency after executing Double Cast increased from 7,500 to 8,000.
Aspected Benefic: Barrier absorption of Nocturnal Benefic increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Damage Taken (Frontline only): Increased from -50% to -45%.
Damage Taken (Frontline only): Reduced from -38% to -45%.

new_content.name: The Merchant's Tale
new_content.description: A variant dungeon where players explore branching paths and face different boss fights depending on their choices.

new_content.name: The Merchant's Tale (Advanced)
new_content.description: A variant dungeon (advanced) featuring stronger versions of bosses from The Merchant's Tale that can be challenged in any order.

new_content.name: Another Merchant's Tale
new_content.description: A criterion dungeon that serves as a linear gauntlet of enhanced bosses from The Merchant's Tale (Advanced) for a party of four.

new_content.name: A Spellbinding Read
new_content.description: Sidequest required to unlock The Merchant's Tale.

new_content.name: Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures
new_content.description: New chapter in the Hildibrand questline.

new_content.name: A Need for Speed
new_content.description: Quest required to advance Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures.

new_content.name: V&C Dungeon Finder
new_content.description: A system used to access variant and criterion dungeons, select variant actions, and manage party matching.

new_content.name: Variant Actions
new_content.description: Special abilities that provide role flexibility (e.g., healing or tanking) within variant dungeons.

new_content.name: Party Composition Bonus
new_content.description: A damage bonus system in Another Merchant's Tale that scales based on the party's job composition.

new_content.name: Field Instances
new_content.description: Implementation of multiple instances for Yak T'el and a new area to reduce server congestion.

housing.name: Corvosi Crystal
housing.description: A crystal so royally purple, no sumptuous mansion of untold riches would truly be complete without one. Preferably two.

housing.name: Corvosi Sofa
housing.description: Lounging upon this luxurious sofa, you shall want only for a cup of sweet Corvosi tea.

housing.name: Corvosi Screen
housing.description: An austere screen designed to complement Corvosi residences. Affords a certain sense of ennui.

housing.name: Corvosi Fan
housing.description: This feathered fan is known to signify status among Corvosi nobles.

housing.name: Imitation Corvosi Shisha
housing.description: Regrettably, this nonfunctional replica cannot produce strange and colorful smoke of any kind.

housing.name: Purple Corvosi Carpet
housing.description: This vibrant purple carpet is sure to make a captivating centerpiece in any room.

housing.name: Green Corvosi Carpet
housing.description: This soothing green carpet is sure to make a captivating centerpiece in any room.
